column1: # /Data Fill — write a numeric sequence into a range.
# Order: 1-2-3 fills column-major — down column A, then down column B,
# stopping at either the end of the range or when the next computed
# ----- 2×3 block, custom Start=10, Step=5: column-major order -----
# ----- Stop clamps the sequence — A1..A10 with Stop=3 fills only 4 cells -----
# Pre-seed: A1..A10 each contain 99. /DF will overwrite the first
